name: Masterpiece BBQ Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cups K-C Masterpiece BBQ sauce (do not substitute)
6 slices bacon, core and peel, then chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Place drained beans in a crockpot.
2. Mix barbecue sauce, onion, raisins, brown sugar, and apples with the beans.
3. Lay bacon strips across the top of the mixture.
4. Cook on low for 4-5 hours.
